Joseph Golia Services is a well-established landscaping materials supplier located at 37 Vassar Avenue, Stamford, Connecticut 06902. Founded in 1988, the company has been serving the Stamford area for over 35 years with premium landscaping materials and expert consultation services. The business specializes in providing topsoil, mulches, playground chips, grass seed, fertilizers, soil amendments, and winter materials including rock salt and ice management products. What sets Joseph Golia Services apart is their team's combined 55+ years of landscaping experience, allowing them to offer professional consultation and material recommendations for both residential and commercial customers. They serve contractors, landscaping professionals, and homeowners throughout the Stamford, CT area. The company can be reached at (203) 324-6705 or via email at info@josephgoliaservices.com. Their expertise in Connecticut's specific climate and soil conditions makes them a trusted partner for landscaping projects of all sizes, from small residential gardens to large commercial developments.
